checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
CORS: open access (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
Server ignores Accept header — always returns same content type

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Moderate semantic HTML: 3 semantic elements vs 16 divs
Good accessibility: 5/5 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: OPTIONS, GET, HEAD

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~2,398 tokens raw — efficient
Signal-to-noise ratio is 3% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 12 — clean structure
